titles.title: I love to be in Your presence

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love to be in Your presence With Your people singing praises; I love to stand and rejoice, Lift my hands and raise my voice.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You set my feet to dancing, You fill my heart with song, You give me reason to rejoice, Rejoice.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lift my hands, Lift my hands, Lift my hands, And raise my voice.
